template.name: form
template.content:
<#assign span24 = ''> <#if table.exportRuleName?? && table.exportRuleName?contains('smodal')> <#assign span24 = '24'> </#if> <#-- 如果是子表，按钮不生成权限标志 --> <#assign isChildTable = "0"> <#if table.parentTable?? && table.parentTable != ""> <#assign isChildTable = "1"> </#if> <#if table.isProcessDefinition?? && (table.isProcessDefinition == "1" || table.isProcessDefinition == "2")> <#-- 工作流表单 --> <#assign hasChildren = false /> <#list table.childList as subTable> <#assign hasChildren = true /> <#break /> </#list> <template> <u-form v-model:value="formModel" extendClass="modern-generated-form ${table.name}-form-view" <#if table.genTableFormProps.subTableType != ''>:subTableType="${table.genTableFormProps.subTableType}" </#if><#if table.genTableFormProps.anchorWidth != ''>:anchorWidth="${table.genTableFormProps.anchorWidth}" </#if><#if table.genTableFormProps.anchorLocation != ''>:anchorLocation="${table.genTableFormProps.anchorLocation}" </#if><#if table.genTableFormProps.getExtendSaveDataFuncStr != ''>:getExtendSaveDataFuncStr="${table.genTableFormProps.getExtendSaveDataFuncStr}" </#if>:showActLog="true" v-model:actRuleArgs="actRuleArgs" v-model:disabled="disabled" :labelWidth="<#if table.genTableFormProps.labelWidth == ''>180<#else>${table.genTableFormProps.labelWidth}</#if>" formNo="${table.name}" <#if hasChildren>mainTableTitle="<#if table.genTableFormProps.mainTableTitle == ''>${table.comments}<#else>${table.genTableFormProps.mainTableTitle}</#if>" :subTables="subTables"</#if> <#if isChildTable == "1" && table.tableType != "4">parentFormNo="${table.parentTable}"</#if> <#if table.pkColumnName?? && table.pkColumnName != ''>:pkColumnName="${table.pkColumnName}"</#if>> <a-row :gutter="16"> <#assign customValidator="0" /> <#assign uniqueFlag="" /> <#list table.columnList as c> <#if c.isForm?? && c.isForm == "1" && (c.isNotBaseField || c.simpleJavaField == 'remarks') && (!c.magicLogic?? || c.magicLogic != "hide")> <#-- 检查规则，字段是否进行唯一值校验 --> <#assign unique="" /> <#if c.remarks?? && c.remarks?contains('unique')> <#-- 唯一校验：formModel 中主键属性名始终为 id（SQL 生成固定映射 AS "id"） --> <#assign unique=",uniqueValidator('${table.name}','${c.comments}',formModel.id)" /> <#assign uniqueFlag="1" /> </#if> <#assign validateType="" /> <#if c.validateType?? && c.validateType != '' && c.validateType != 'string'> <#if c.validateType == 'email'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.emailValidator, message: '请输入电子邮件'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'url'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.urlValidator, message: '请输入网址'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'number'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.numberValidator, message: '请输入整数'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'digits'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.digitsValidator, message: '请输入数字'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'creditcard'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.creditcardValidator, message: '请输入信用卡号'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'mobile'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.mobileValidator, message: '请输入手机号码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'phone'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.phoneValidator, message: '请输入电话号码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'telephone'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.telephoneValidator, message: '请输入联系方式'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'isQq'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.isQqValidator, message: '请输入QQ号码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'fax'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.faxValidator, message: '请输入传真'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'zipCode'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.zipCodeValidator, message: '请输入邮政编码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'idCard'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.idCardValidator, message: '请输入身份证号'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'bankNo'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.bankNoValidator, message: '请输入银行卡号'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'isNumber'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.isNumberValidator, message: '请输入数值(整数、小数)'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'ip'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.ipValidator, message: '请输入IP地址'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'latitude'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.latitudeValidator, message: '请输入纬度'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'longitude'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.longitudeValidator, message: '请输入经度'}" /> </#if> </#if> <#assign messageStart='请输入' /> <#if c.showType == "select" || c.showType == "selectAutoSearch" || c.showType == "selectLocation" || c.showType == "checkbox" || c.showType == "radiobox" || c.showType == "dateselect" || c.showType == "areaselect" || c.showType == "treeselect" || c.showType == "gridselect" || c.showType == "gridtabs" || c.showType == "treeselectRedio" || c.showType == "treeselectCheck" || c.showType == "officeselectTree" || c.showType == "parentId" || c.showType == "iconselect"> <#assign messageStart='请选择' /> <#elseif c.showType == "fileupload" || c.showType == "fileuploadsec" || c.showType == "fileuploadpic" || c.showType == "fileuploadonline"> <#assign messageStart='请上传' /> </#if> <#assign requiredFieldName='${c.name}' /> <#if c.showType == "areaselect" || c.showType == "treeselect" || c.showType == "gridselect" || c.showType == "gridtabs" || c.showType == "treeselectRedio" || c.showType == "treeselectCheck" || c.showType == "officeselectTree"> <#assign requiredFieldName='${c.name}.id' /> <#elseif c.showType == "parentId"> <#assign requiredFieldName='${c.javaFieldId}' /> </#if> <#assign rules='' /> <#assign tempMessage = '${messageStart}${c.comments}' /> <#if (c.showType == "input" || c.showType == "sortInput") && c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder != ''> <#assign tempMessage = '${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}' /> </#if> <#if validateType == ''> <#assign rules=':rules="[{ required: isFormItemRequire(actRuleArgs,\'${requiredFieldName}\'), message: \'${tempMessage}\' }${unique}]"' /> <#elseif validateType != ''> <#assign rules=':rules="[{ required: isFormItemRequire(actRuleArgs,\'${requiredFieldName}\'), message: \'${tempMessage}\' }${unique},${validateType}]"' /> <#assign customValidator="1" /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.extra != ''> <#assign rules = rules + ' :extra="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.extra}"' /> </#if> <#assign span='${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.span}' /> <#if c.isOneLine?? && (c.isOneLine == "1" || c.showType == "richText" || c.showType == "fileselect" || c.showType == "fileselectclassic" || c.showType == "fileselectsec" || c.showType == "fileupload" || c.showType == "fileuploadsec" || c.showType == "fileuploadpic" || c.showType == "fileuploadonline") || span24 != ""> <#assign span='24' /> </#if> <#assign uuserConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "treeselectRedio" || c.showType == "treeselectCheck"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.dataScope != ''> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + ':dataScope="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.dataScope}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetOrgId != ''> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + 'targetOrgId="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetOrgId}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth != ''> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + ':modalWidth="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.hideLoginName == '1'> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + ':hideLoginName="true" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#assign uareaConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "areaselect"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.freeChoice == '1'> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':freeChoice="true" ' /> <#else> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':freeChoice="false" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.showRank != ''> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':showRank="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.showRank}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.rootAreaId != ''> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':rootAreaId="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.rootAreaId}" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#assign uuploadConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "fileupload" || c.showType == "fileuploadsec" || c.showType == "fileuploadpic" || c.showType == "fileuploadonline"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.accepts != ''> <#assign uuploadConfig = uuploadConfig + ':accepts="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.accepts}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.fileCount != ''> <#assign uuploadConfig = uuploadConfig + ':fileCount="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.fileCount}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxSize != ''> <#assign uuploadConfig = uuploadConfig + ':maxSize="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxSize}" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#assign umselectfilterData = ':filterData=[]' /> <#assign umselectsearchConfig = ':searchConfig={}' /> <#assign umselectformUpdateMap = ':formUpdateMap={}' /> <#assign umselectConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "gridselect"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFormNo != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':targetFormNo="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFormNo}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetField != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':targetField="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetField}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':searchLabelWidth="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig != ''> <#assign umselectsearchConfig = ':searchConfig="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':modalWidth="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':modalTitle="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formUpdateMap != ''> <#assign umselectformUpdateMap = ':formUpdateMap="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formUpdateMap}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.nameDataIndex != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':nameDataIndex="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.nameDataIndex}" ' /> </#if> <#assign selectDsf='' /> <#if c.selectDsf??> <#assign selectDsf=c.selectDsf?replace("’","'") /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData != ''> <#assign umselectfilterData = ':filterData="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData == '' && selectDsf != ''> <#assign umselectfilterData = ':filterData="[${selectDsf}]" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#if c.showType == "input" || c.showType == "sortInput"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-input<#if c.validateType == 'number'> type="number"<#elseif c.validateType == 'digits'> type="digits"</#if> :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder = ''>${messageStart}${c.comments}<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}</#if>" <#if c.maxLength != '' && c.validateType != 'number' && c.validateType != 'digits'>:maxlength="${c.maxLength}"</#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.min != ''>:min="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.min}" </#if><#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.max != ''>:max="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.max}" </#if>/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "textarea"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-input :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" :textarea="true" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder = ''>${messageStart}${c.comments}<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}</#if>" <#if c.maxLength != ''>:maxlength="${c.maxLength}"</#if>/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "select"> <#if c.selectSimple?? && c.selectSimple == '0'> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" form-type="select" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" type="table" dict-type="${c.tableName}" valueField="${c.selectValuefield}" textField="${c.searchKey}" tableOrderBy="${c.selectOrder}" :tableFilterData="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.tableFilterData = ''>[${c.selectDsf}]<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.tableFilterData}</#if>"<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formatFuncStr != ''> formatFuncStr="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formatFuncStr}"</#if> placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#else> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" form-type="select" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> </#if> <#elseif c.showType == "selectAutoSearch"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" form-type="selectAutoSearch" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" tableName="${c.tableName}" searchKey="${c.searchKey}" searchJavaField="${c.searchJavaField}" javaField="${c.javaField}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "selectLocation"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" form-type="selectLocation" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "checkbox"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" :multiple="true" form-type="checkbox" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "radiobox"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" form-type="radio" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "dateselect"> <#assign mvalue='' /> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxValue != ''> <#assign mvalue = '${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxValue} ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.minValue != ''> <#assign mvalue = mvalue + '${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.minValue} ' /> </#if> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-date :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" formatPatter="${c.dateType}" ${mvalue}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "areaselect"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-area :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uareaConfig}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileupload"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileuploadsec"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :sec="true" :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileuploadpic"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :picture="true" :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileuploadonline"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :online="true" :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "treeselect"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-tree-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" :props="{actionUrl:'/dynamic/zform/treeData?parentId=0&traceFlag=1&formNo=${c.tableName}',sync:'false',check:'false',chooseParent:'true'}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "gridselect"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-modal-select formNo="${c.tableName}" <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey != ''> :searchKey="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey}" <#else> searchKey="${c.searchKey} </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel != ''> :searchLabel="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel}" <#else> searchLabel="${c.searchLabel} </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList?has_content> :columns="[ <#list c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList as col> ${col}, </#list> ]" <#else> :columns="[ <#list c.fieldLabels?split(",") as fieldLabel> {title: '${fieldLabel}', dataIndex:'<#list c.fieldKeys?split(",") as fieldKey><#if fieldLabel_index == fieldKey_index>${fieldKey}</#if></#list>',align: 'left'}, </#list> ]" </#if> ${umselectConfig} <#if umselectfilterData != ''>${umselectfilterData}</#if> <#if umselectsearchConfig != ''>${umselectsearchConfig}</#if> <#if umselectformUpdateMap != ''>${umselectformUpdateMap}</#if> v-model:formModel="formModel" :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "treeselectRedio"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-user-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuserConfig}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "treeselectCheck"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-users-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuserConfig}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "officeselectTree"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-office-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}.id')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "parentId"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'parent.id')"> <a-form-item name="parent" label="${c.comments}" :validateFirst="true"> <u-tree-select formNo="<#if table.tableType?? && table.tableType == "4">${table.parentTable}<#else>${table.name}</#if>" :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'parent.id')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.parent" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "gridtabs"> 选择${c.comments} <#elseif c.showType == "iconselect"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" :validateFirst="true" ${rules}> <u-icon-select :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "switch"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-switch :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "summernote" || c.showType == "richText"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" :validateFirst="true" ${rules}> <u-tinymce :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "serialNo"> <a-col :span="${span}" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-serial-no :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${c.name}')" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" <#if (c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.prefix)?? && c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.prefix != ''>prefix="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.prefix}" </#if>placeholder="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder = ''>${messageStart}${c.comments}<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}</#if>"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> </#if> </#if> </#list> <#list table.extRuleManyToMany as m> <a-col :span="24" v-if="isFormItemShow(actRuleArgs,'${m.name}')"> <a-form-item name="${m.name}" label="${m.label}" :validateFirst="true" :rules="[{ required: ${m.required}, message: '请选择${m.label}' }]"> <u-modal-multi-select formNo="${m.formNo}" <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle != ''> modalTitle="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle}" </#if> :modalWidth="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth}" <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFilterData?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFilterData != ''> :targetFilterData="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFilterData}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData != ''> :filterData="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth != ''> :searchLabelWidth="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig != ''> :searchConfig="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey != ''> :searchKey="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey}" <#else> searchKey="${m.searchKey} </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel != ''> :searchLabel="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel}" <#else> searchLabel="${m.searchLabel} </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList?has_content> :columns="[ <#list m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList as col> ${col}, </#list> ]" <#else> :columns="[ {title: '${m.codeFiledTitle}', dataIndex:'${m.codeFiled}',align: '${m.codeFiledAlign}'}, {title: '${m.nameFiledTitle}', dataIndex:'${m.nameFiled}',align: '${m.nameFiledAlign}'}, ]" </#if> codeFiled="${m.codeFiled}" nameFiled="${m.nameFiled}" :format="item=>{ if (item.code) { return `${'$'}{item.name} （${'$'}{item.code}）` } return item.name }" :disabled="disabled || isFormItemDisabled(actRuleArgs,'${m.name}')" v-model:value="formModel.${m.name}" placeholder="请选择${m.label}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> </#list> <!-- <template v-if="actExtendShow(actRuleArgs)"> <a-divider/> <slot v-if="!disabled" name="actComment" v-bind="formItemStatus(actRuleArgs,'act.comment')"/> <slot name="actLog" v-bind="formItemStatus(actRuleArgs,'act.log')"/> </template> --> </a-row> </u-form> </template>
<script> export default { name: "${table.name}_form", } </script> <script setup> import {isFormItemShow, isFormItemDisabled, isFormItemRequire} from "@/lib/act/actForm"; import {ref} from "vue"; <#list table.childList as subTable> import ${subTable.name?replace(".","_","i")}_list from "@/views/${subTable.module}/${subTable.name}/list"; </#list> <#if uniqueFlag != ""> import {uniqueValidator} from "@/lib/validator"; </#if> <#if customValidator == "1" > import * as validator from "@/lib/validator" let customValidator = ref(validator) </#if> let formModel = ref({}) let disabled = ref(false) let actRuleArgs = ref({}) <#if hasChildren> let subTables = ref([ <#list table.childList as subTable> {title: '${subTable.comments}', component: ${subTable.name?replace(".","_","i")}_list}, </#list> ]) </#if>
</script> <style scoped> </style> <#else> <#-- 非工作流表单 --> <#assign hasChildren = false /> <#list table.childList as subTable> <#assign hasChildren = true /> <#break /> </#list> <template> <u-form v-model:value="formModel" extendClass="modern-generated-form ${table.name}-form-view" <#if table.genTableFormProps.subTableType != ''>:subTableType="${table.genTableFormProps.subTableType}" </#if><#if table.genTableFormProps.anchorWidth != ''>:anchorWidth="${table.genTableFormProps.anchorWidth}" </#if><#if table.genTableFormProps.anchorLocation != ''>:anchorLocation="${table.genTableFormProps.anchorLocation}" </#if><#if table.genTableFormProps.getExtendSaveDataFuncStr != ''>:getExtendSaveDataFuncStr="${table.genTableFormProps.getExtendSaveDataFuncStr}" </#if>v-model:disabled="disabled" :labelWidth="<#if table.genTableFormProps.labelWidth == ''>180<#else>${table.genTableFormProps.labelWidth}</#if>" formNo="${table.name}" <#if hasChildren>mainTableTitle="${table.comments}" :subTables="subTables"</#if> <#if isChildTable == "1" && table.tableType != "4">parentFormNo="${table.parentTable}"</#if> <#if table.pkColumnName?? && table.pkColumnName != ''>:pkColumnName="${table.pkColumnName}"</#if>> <a-row :gutter="16"> <#assign customValidator="0" /> <#assign uniqueFlag="" /> <#list table.columnList as c> <#if c.isForm?? && c.isForm == "1" && (c.isNotBaseField || c.simpleJavaField == 'remarks') && (!c.magicLogic?? || c.magicLogic != "hide")> <#-- 是否可编辑 --> <#assign disabled="disabled" /> <#if c.isEdit?? && c.isEdit == '0'> <#assign disabled="true" /> </#if> <#-- 检查规则，字段是否进行唯一值校验 --> <#assign unique="" /> <#if c.remarks?? && c.remarks?contains('unique')> <#-- 唯一校验：formModel 中主键属性名始终为 id（SQL 生成固定映射 AS "id"） --> <#assign unique=",uniqueValidator('${table.name}','${c.comments}',formModel.id)" /> <#assign uniqueFlag="1" /> </#if> <#assign validateType="" /> <#if c.validateType?? && c.validateType != '' && c.validateType != 'string'> <#if c.validateType == 'email'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.emailValidator, message: '请输入电子邮件'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'url'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.urlValidator, message: '请输入网址'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'number'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.numberValidator, message: '请输入整数'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'digits'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.digitsValidator, message: '请输入数字'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'creditcard'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.creditcardValidator, message: '请输入信用卡号'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'mobile'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.mobileValidator, message: '请输入手机号码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'phone'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.phoneValidator, message: '请输入电话号码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'telephone'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.telephoneValidator, message: '请输入联系方式'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'isQq'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.isQqValidator, message: '请输入QQ号码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'fax'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.faxValidator, message: '请输入传真'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'zipCode'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.zipCodeValidator, message: '请输入邮政编码'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'idCard'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.idCardValidator, message: '请输入身份证号'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'bankNo'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.bankNoValidator, message: '请输入银行卡号'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'isNumber'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.isNumberValidator, message: '请输入数值(整数、小数)'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'ip'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.ipValidator, message: '请输入IP地址'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'latitude'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.latitudeValidator, message: '请输入纬度'}" /> </#if> <#if c.validateType == 'longitude'> <#assign validateType="{ validator : customValidator.longitudeValidator, message: '请输入经度'}" /> </#if> </#if> <#assign messageStart='请输入' /> <#if c.showType == "select" || c.showType == "selectAutoSearch" || c.showType == "selectLocation" || c.showType == "checkbox" || c.showType == "radiobox" || c.showType == "dateselect" || c.showType == "areaselect" || c.showType == "treeselect" || c.showType == "gridselect" || c.showType == "gridtabs" || c.showType == "treeselectRedio" || c.showType == "treeselectCheck" || c.showType == "officeselectTree" || c.showType == "parentId" || c.showType == "iconselect"> <#assign messageStart='请选择' /> <#elseif c.showType == "fileupload" || c.showType == "fileuploadsec" || c.showType == "fileuploadpic" || c.showType == "fileuploadonline"> <#assign messageStart='请上传' /> </#if> <#assign tempMessage = '${messageStart}${c.comments}' /> <#if (c.showType == "input" || c.showType == "sortInput") && c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder != ''> <#assign tempMessage = '${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}' /> </#if> <#assign required="" /> <#if c.isNull?? && c.isNull != '1'> <#assign required="{ required: true, message: '${tempMessage}' }" /> </#if> <#assign rules='' /> <#if required != '' && validateType == ''> <#assign rules=':rules="[{ required: true, message: \'${tempMessage}\' }${unique}]"' /> <#elseif required != '' && validateType != ''> <#assign rules=':rules="[{ required: true, message: \'${tempMessage}\' }${unique},${validateType}]"' /> <#assign customValidator="1" /> <#elseif required == '' && validateType != ''> <#assign rules=':rules="[${unique}${validateType}]"' /> <#assign customValidator="1" /> <#elseif unique != ''> <#assign rules=':rules="[${unique}]"' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.extra != ''> <#assign rules = rules + ' :extra="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.extra}"' /> </#if> <#assign span='${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.span}' /> <#if c.isOneLine?? && (c.isOneLine == "1" || c.showType == "fileselect" || c.showType == "fileselectclassic" || c.showType == "fileselectsec" || c.showType == "fileupload" || c.showType == "fileuploadsec" || c.showType == "fileuploadpic" || c.showType == "fileuploadonline") || span24 != ""> <#assign span='24' /> </#if> <#assign uuserConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "treeselectRedio" || c.showType == "treeselectCheck"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.dataScope != ''> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + ':dataScope="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.dataScope}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetOrgId != ''> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + 'targetOrgId="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetOrgId}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth != ''> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + ':modalWidth="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.hideLoginName == '1'> <#assign uuserConfig = uuserConfig + ':hideLoginName="true" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#assign uareaConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "areaselect"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.freeChoice == '1'> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':freeChoice="true" ' /> <#else> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':freeChoice="false" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.showRank != ''> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':showRank="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.showRank}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.rootAreaId != ''> <#assign uareaConfig = uareaConfig + ':rootAreaId="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.rootAreaId}" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#assign uuploadConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "fileupload" || c.showType == "fileuploadsec" || c.showType == "fileuploadpic" || c.showType == "fileuploadonline"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.accepts != ''> <#assign uuploadConfig = uuploadConfig + ':accepts="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.accepts}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.fileCount != ''> <#assign uuploadConfig = uuploadConfig + ':fileCount="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.fileCount}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxSize != ''> <#assign uuploadConfig = uuploadConfig + ':maxSize="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxSize}" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#assign umselectfilterData = ':filterData=[]' /> <#assign umselectsearchConfig = ':searchConfig={}' /> <#assign umselectformUpdateMap = ':formUpdateMap={}' /> <#assign umselectConfig = '' /> <#if c.showType == "gridselect"> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFormNo != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':targetFormNo="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFormNo}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetField != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':targetField="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetField}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':searchLabelWidth="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig != ''> <#assign umselectsearchConfig = ':searchConfig="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':modalWidth="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':modalTitle="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formUpdateMap != ''> <#assign umselectformUpdateMap = ':formUpdateMap="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formUpdateMap}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.nameDataIndex != ''> <#assign umselectConfig = umselectConfig + ':nameDataIndex="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.nameDataIndex}" ' /> </#if> <#assign selectDsf='' /> <#if c.selectDsf??> <#assign selectDsf=c.selectDsf?replace("’","'") /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData != ''> <#assign umselectfilterData = ':filterData="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData}" ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData == '' && selectDsf != ''> <#assign umselectfilterData = ':filterData="[${selectDsf}]" ' /> </#if> </#if> <#if c.showType == "input" || c.showType == "sortInput"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-input<#if c.validateType == 'number'> type="number"<#elseif c.validateType == 'digits'> type="digits"</#if> :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder = ''>${messageStart}${c.comments}<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}</#if>" <#if c.maxLength != '' && c.validateType != 'number' && c.validateType != 'digits'>:maxlength="${c.maxLength}"</#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.min != ''>:min="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.min}" </#if><#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.max != ''>:max="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.max}" </#if>/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "textarea"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-input :disabled="${disabled}" :textarea="true" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder = ''>${messageStart}${c.comments}<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}</#if>" <#if c.maxLength != ''>:maxlength="${c.maxLength}"</#if>/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "select"> <#if c.selectSimple?? && c.selectSimple == '0'> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="${disabled}" form-type="select" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" type="table" dict-type="${c.tableName}" valueField="${c.selectValuefield}" textField="${c.searchKey}" tableOrderBy="${c.selectOrder}" :tableFilterData="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.tableFilterData = ''>[${c.selectDsf}]<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.tableFilterData}</#if>"<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formatFuncStr != ''> formatFuncStr="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.formatFuncStr}"</#if> placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#else> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="${disabled}" form-type="select" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> </#if> <#elseif c.showType == "selectAutoSearch"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="${disabled}" form-type="selectAutoSearch" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" tableName="${c.tableName}" searchKey="${c.searchKey}" searchJavaField="${c.searchJavaField}" javaField="${c.javaField}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "selectLocation"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="${disabled}" form-type="selectLocation" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "checkbox"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="${disabled}" :multiple="true" form-type="checkbox" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "radiobox"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-select :disabled="${disabled}" form-type="radio" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" dict-type="${c.dictType}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "dateselect"> <#assign mvalue='' /> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxValue != ''> <#assign mvalue = '${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.maxValue} ' /> </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.minValue != ''> <#assign mvalue = mvalue + '${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.minValue} ' /> </#if> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-date :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" formatPatter="${c.dateType}" ${mvalue}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "areaselect"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-area :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uareaConfig}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileupload"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :disabled="${disabled}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileuploadsec"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :sec="true" :disabled="${disabled}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileuploadpic"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :picture="true" :disabled="${disabled}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "fileuploadonline"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-upload :online="true" :disabled="${disabled}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuploadConfig}/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "treeselect"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-tree-select :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}" :props="{actionUrl:'/dynamic/zform/treeData?parentId=0&traceFlag=1&formNo=${c.tableName}',sync:'false',check:'false',chooseParent:'true'}" /> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "gridselect"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <#assign selectDsf='' /> <#if c.selectDsf??> <#assign selectDsf=c.selectDsf?replace("’","'") /> </#if> <u-modal-select formNo="${c.tableName}" <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey != ''> :searchKey="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey}" <#else> searchKey="${c.searchKey} </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel != ''> :searchLabel="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel}" <#else> searchLabel="${c.searchLabel} </#if> <#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList?has_content> :columns="[ <#list c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList as col> ${col}, </#list> ]" <#else> :columns="[ <#list c.fieldLabels?split(",") as fieldLabel> {title: '${fieldLabel}', dataIndex:'<#list c.fieldKeys?split(",") as fieldKey><#if fieldLabel_index == fieldKey_index>${fieldKey}</#if></#list>',align: 'left'}, </#list> ]" </#if> ${umselectConfig} <#if umselectfilterData != ''>${umselectfilterData}</#if> <#if umselectsearchConfig != ''>${umselectsearchConfig}</#if> <#if umselectformUpdateMap != ''>${umselectformUpdateMap}</#if> v-model:formModel="formModel" :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "treeselectRedio"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-user-select :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuserConfig}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "treeselectCheck"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-users-select :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" ${uuserConfig}placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "officeselectTree"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-office-select :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "parentId"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="parent" label="${c.comments}" :validateFirst="true"> <u-tree-select formNo="<#if table.tableType?? && table.tableType == "4">${table.parentTable}<#else>${table.name}</#if>" :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.parent" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "gridtabs"> 选择${c.comments} <#elseif c.showType == "iconselect"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" :validateFirst="true" ${rules}> <u-icon-select :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" placeholder="${messageStart}${c.comments}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "switch"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-switch :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "summernote" || c.showType == "richText"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" :validateFirst="true" ${rules}> <u-tinymce :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> <#elseif c.showType == "serialNo"> <a-col :span="${span}"> <a-form-item name="${c.name}" label="${c.comments}" ${rules}> <u-serial-no :disabled="${disabled}" defaultValue="${c.defaultValue}" v-model:value="formModel.${c.name}" <#if (c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.prefix)?? && c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.prefix != ''>prefix="${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.prefix}" </#if>placeholder="<#if c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder = ''>${messageStart}${c.comments}<#else>${c.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.placeholder}</#if>"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> </#if> </#if> </#list> <#list table.extRuleManyToMany as m> <a-col :span="24"> <a-form-item name="${m.name}" label="${m.label}" :validateFirst="true" :rules="[{ required: ${m.required}, message: '请选择${m.label}' }]"> <u-modal-multi-select formNo="${m.formNo}" <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle != ''> modalTitle="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalTitle}" </#if> :modalWidth="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.modalWidth}" <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFilterData?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFilterData != ''> :targetFilterData="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.targetFilterData}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData != ''> :filterData="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.filterData}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth != ''> :searchLabelWidth="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabelWidth}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig?? && m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig != ''> :searchConfig="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchConfig}" </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey != ''> :searchKey="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchKey}" <#else> searchKey="${m.searchKey} </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel != ''> :searchLabel="${m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.searchLabel}" <#else> searchLabel="${m.searchLabel} </#if> <#if m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList?has_content> :columns="[ <#list m.genTableColumnFormItemConfig.columnsList as col> ${col}, </#list> ]" <#else> :columns="[ {title: '${m.codeFiledTitle}', dataIndex:'${m.codeFiled}',align: '${m.codeFiledAlign}'}, {title: '${m.nameFiledTitle}', dataIndex:'${m.nameFiled}',align: '${m.nameFiledAlign}'}, ]" </#if> codeFiled="${m.codeFiled}" nameFiled="${m.nameFiled}" :format="item=>{ if (item.code) { return `${'$'}{item.name} （${'$'}{item.code}）` } return item.name }" :disabled="disabled" v-model:value="formModel.${m.name}" placeholder="请选择${m.label}"/> </a-form-item> </a-col> </#list> </a-row> </u-form> </template>
<script> export default { name: "${table.name}_form", } </script> <script setup>
import {ref} from "vue"; <#list table.childList as subTable> import ${subTable.name?replace(".","_","i")}_list from "@/views/${subTable.module}/${subTable.name}/list"; </#list> <#if uniqueFlag != ""> import {uniqueValidator} from "@/lib/validator"; </#if> <#if customValidator == "1" > import * as validator from "@/lib/validator" let customValidator = ref(validator) </#if> let formModel = ref({}) let disabled = ref(false) <#if hasChildren> let subTables = ref([ <#list table.childList as subTable> {title: '${subTable.comments}', component: ${subTable.name?replace(".","_","i")}_list}, </#list> ]) </#if>
</script> <style scoped> </style> </#if>
